query: I have a completed trend report at projects/energy-transition/output/tips-trend-report.md and I want to turn it into a nice HTML page with charts, an infographic header, and a sidebar for navigation. Can you enrich it?
Can you add data visualizations to my research report? It's at projects/ai-market/output/report.md and has a lot of statistics and comparison tables that would look much better as interactive charts
make my markdown report look presentable -- it needs a themed HTML version with navigation and some concept diagrams. the file is at research-output/findings.md, about 4000 words with lots of numbers
I need to export my trend report as PDF. The report is at output/tips-trend-report.md and I want charts included in the PDF version too
Bericht visualisieren -- ich habe einen fertigen Forschungsbericht unter berichte/analyse.md und brauche eine HTML-Version mit Diagrammen und einem Navigations-Sidebar
The report at docs/market-analysis.md is text-only and honestly looks boring. Can you enrich it with charts and make it look like a proper Economist-style deliverable with a themed layout?
I want to convert my research report to DOCX format for the client. It's at projects/cloud-strategy/output/report.md and about 6000 words. Keep all citations intact

my cogni-research report is done but it's just plain markdown -- it has cost comparisons, timeline data, and a big table of market sizing numbers. can you make it visual with inline diagrams and proper navigation? file is at output/report.md
add charts to my report at ~/reports/quarterly-review.md. it has a comparison table with 8 rows of vendor scores and a timeline section with 12 milestones that should be visualized

I finished writing a generic markdown report about our DevOps transformation. It's at docs/devops-report.md. Can you generate a themed HTML version with Chart.js visualizations and a nice infographic summary at the top?
den fertigen Trend-Report unter output/tips-trend-report.md als PDF exportieren bitte, mit allen Diagrammen und dem Infografik-Header

I have this report at output/sustainability-analysis.md that needs to become a polished HTML deliverable I can send to the board. Themed, with sidebar nav and a few data charts where the stats are dense. Balanced density should be fine.
Create a research report about AI adoption in European healthcare. Use at least 10 web sources and include market sizing data with TAM/SAM/SOM breakdown.
Transform my trend report narrative into a slide deck for the board meeting next week. I need about 15 slides with speaker notes and a clear story arc.
I need a single-page infographic summarizing our product strategy -- a visual one-pager I can print and hand out at the conference. The source narrative is at output/strategy.md
Polish the writing in my report -- fix the grammar, strengthen the executive summary, make the prose more concise, and apply the Pyramid framework to the argument structure
Build me a TIPS trends dashboard showing the full project lifecycle with interactive filters and status for all 60 trend candidates
Create a scrollable web landing page from our sales narrative that we can host on our website. Source is at output/sales-narrative.md, I want sections with parallax scrolling
I need to merge these three PDF files into one document and add page numbers. The files are invoice-q1.pdf, invoice-q2.pdf, and invoice-q3.pdf in my downloads folder
Generate a trend scouting report for the renewable energy industry with TIPS analysis across Technology, Industry, Politics, and Society dimensions
